summary: Promoted ADR 0274 MinIO object storage into canonical mainline truth as repository version `0.177.124` and first verified platform version `0.130.79` after refreshing from the latest realistic `origin/main` commit `14b18869a2ff421ec12596bd199af0adb09a95b8`. The shared MinIO API and authenticated console are now live from `docker-runtime-lv3`, the launch buckets for Loki, Langfuse, Gitea LFS, and RAG staging remain governed from repo automation, and the shared `minio-root` repository path now backs the verified Restic config-backup and restore workflow on current `main`.

verification.check: Focused MinIO, Restic, and OpenBao validation bundle
verification.observed: The integrated tree passed focused pytest for the MinIO runtime, Restic backup, and OpenBao recovery surfaces (`25 passed`), plus `make syntax-check-minio`, `make syntax-check-restic-config-backup`, and `ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/openbao.yml --syntax-check`.

verification.check: Controller-side Restic backup and restore verification
verification.observed: `make restic-config-backup env=production` produced `receipts/restic-backups/20260331T224319Z.json` after clearing a verified stale repository lock, and `make restic-config-restore-verify env=production` produced `receipts/restic-restore-verifications/20260331T224348Z.json` with `result: pass` and `restored_file_count: 3351`.

verification.check: Mainline MinIO live apply and edge verification
verification.observed: The final `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=minio env=production` replay succeeded end to end, keeping local MinIO health, public `https://minio.lv3.org/minio/health/live`, the authenticated console redirect at `https://minio-console.lv3.org`, and the post-apply Restic backup hook green while writing `receipts/restic-backups/20260331T225338Z.json`.

verification.check: Shared recovery documentation and automation hardening
verification.observed: The Langfuse bucket CORS smoke probe is now retry-hardened for transient post-recovery connection refusals, and the repo runbooks document both the shared Docker-runtime disk-pressure dependency and the safe stale-lock recovery flow for the MinIO-backed Restic path.

notes: This receipt records the first verified `main`-integrated platform promotion for ADR 0274 MinIO object storage.

The integrated replay started from latest realistic `origin/main` commit `14b18869a2ff421ec12596bd199af0adb09a95b8`, which still carried repository version `0.177.123` and platform version `0.130.78` before this promotion.
The transient `r8` Langfuse CORS probe failure was corrected by hardening the verification retry contract rather than weakening the MinIO edge or bucket assertions.
A manually interrupted backup left a stale Restic repository lock; the final proof set preserves the PID check and `restic unlock` recovery instead of hiding the operator-facing behavior.
Shared Docker-runtime disk headroom is now documented as an operational dependency for both MinIO and the MinIO-backed Restic backup workflow.

correction_loop.repair_action: Added connection-refused retries and bounded curl timeouts to the Langfuse bucket CORS smoke probe, then replayed the full MinIO live-apply wrapper until the local runtime, public API, authenticated console redirect, and post-apply Restic hook all passed.
